audio_description: The audio clip features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace, accompanied by the sound of wind blowing and distant thunder rumbling.
temporal_description: In a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor, a woman with shoulder-length hair, wearing a dark jacket, stands facing forward, holding a wand in her right hand. To her left, a man with short hair, wearing a light-colored shirt under a dark coat, is partially visible, also holding a wand and facing the woman. In the background, a figure in dark clothing runs through an arched doorway, moving away from the camera. The scene shifts to a close-up of two hands reaching toward each other, one with a ring on the ring finger, set against a blurred, cloudy backdrop. The final shot shows a group of armored knights standing in formation, their faces obscured by helmets, holding spears and standing in a dark, forested area.
